Title: Relates to discounted tolls on the Verrazano-Narrows bridge for residents of Kings county using a personal vehicle
Summary: Directs the Triborough bridge and tunnel authority to establish a reduced toll on the Verrazano-Narrows bridge for residents of the county of Kings using a personal vehicle of seventy per centum of the regular crossing fare imposed.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law, in relation to discounted tolls on the Verrazano-Narrows bridge for residents of Kings county using a personal vehicle
